steps.text: Migrating emit to a single event-object API and updating all six wire call sites.

args.command: for f in $(find src -name '*.js'); do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && node -e "const a=require('./src/wire/a.js'); process.exit(a.a(5)==='ping:5'?0:1)" && ! grep -rEn "emit\(['\"]" src/wire

steps.done: Migrated emit to emit(event) and updated all six call sites in src/wire/{a,b,c}.js to pass a single { type, payload } object; tree compiles, outputs unchanged, no two-arg emit calls remain.
